title: GraphQL API - Live query waiting for new email
description: Example of a live GraphQL query that waits for a new email matching specific criteria before returning. The server holds the connection until an email arrives or 60 seconds elapses (then returns HTTP 307).

body.query: query { inbox(namespace: "mynamespace", tag: "signup-testuser999", livequery: true) { result count emails { from subject text timestamp } } }

livequery_behavior.description: The server holds the request open until a matching email arrives or 60 seconds pass.
livequery_behavior.on_email_received: Returns 200 with the matching email immediately.
livequery_behavior.on_timeout: Returns HTTP 307 redirect to the same URL. The client must follow redirects and resend the request.

emails.subject: Welcome! Please complete your signup.
emails.text: Thank you for signing up. Please confirm your account.
